comment: Embedded model assets are hosted on Hugging Face (public, ungated): Google's quantized EmbeddingGemma at metricspace/embeddinggemma-300m-q4k, and greppy's own in-house Qwen3.5 fine-tune at metricspace/greppy-qwen35-mtp-q4km. tools/fetch_model_assets.sh downloads them into crates/cli/assets/ and verifies every file against the sha256 below before build.rs bakes it into the binary. Promoting a new model = upload to its HF repo and bump that entry's sha256 + its .sha256 sidecar in the same commit. Point GREPPY_MODEL_ASSET_HF_HOST at a mirror to override the host.
